description:
A billing specialist needs to record a procedure charge in FreeMED for patient Margaret Thompson. Record the following procedure/charge entry:

- CPT Code: 99213 (Office/outpatient visit, established patient, Level 3)
- Primary Diagnosis (ICD): I10 (Essential hypertension)
- Charge Amount: 150.00
- Units: 1
- Date of Service: 2025-01-15
- Performing Provider: Admin User
- Place of Service: 11 (Office)

FreeMED is accessible at http://localhost/freemed/ and you are logged in as admin (password: admin). The patient Margaret Thompson already exists in the system.
